description: DevRev is an enterprise platform that unifies customer support, product, engineering, and operations workflows with built-in AI capabilities. It also provides tooling for developers to integrate with the platform, build snap-ins, and use AirSync for data import and mapping.
summary: DevRev exposes a PAT-authenticated REST API at https://api.devrev.ai, an official MCP server at https://api.devrev.ai/mcp/v1, and a DevRev CLI for working with the platform and snap-ins.

packages.runtimeHint: Install from the formula downloaded from the latest GitHub release
Download the Debian package from the latest GitHub release
